languages.text: Трубки врезали в плоть и залили в них субстанции отвратительного вида. Странный аппарат циклично перерабатывает жидкости в теле реципиента. Основная, толстая трубка пришита к губам — несчастный агонизировал десятилетиями, питаясь собственной кровью.

traits.locale_text: Трубки врезали в плоть и залили в них субстанции отвратительного вида. Странный аппарат циклично перерабатывает жидкости в теле реципиента. Основная, толстая трубка пришита к губам — несчастный агонизировал десятилетиями, питаясь собственной кровью.

languages.text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.
languages.original_text: Трубки врезали в плоть и залили в них субстанции отвратительного вида. Странный аппарат циклично перерабатывает жидкости в теле реципиента. Основная, толстая трубка пришита к губам — несчастный агонизировал десятилетиями, питаясь собственной кровью.

traits.locale_text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

languages.text: 大量导管刺进皮肉，里面灌满了令人作呕的液体。那台怪异的机器让液体在受刑者体内不断循环。最粗的那根主管直接缝在了他的嘴唇上——这可怜人数十年来饱受煎熬，靠喝自己的血苟活着。
languages.original_text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

traits.locale_text: 大量导管刺进皮肉，里面灌满了令人作呕的液体。那台怪异的机器让液体在受刑者体内不断循环。最粗的那根主管直接缝在了他的嘴唇上——这可怜人数十年来饱受煎熬，靠喝自己的血苟活着。

languages.text: Se han introducido conductos en su carne y se han llenado con una sustancia de aspecto horrendo. La extraña máquina mueve los fluidos por el cuerpo de la víctima. El tubo principal, el más grueso, está cosido a sus labios: el pobre hombre lleva décadas sufriendo, alimentándose de su propia sangre.
languages.original_text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

traits.locale_text: Se han introducido conductos en su carne y se han llenado con una sustancia de aspecto horrendo. La extraña máquina mueve los fluidos por el cuerpo de la víctima. El tubo principal, el más grueso, está cosido a sus labios: el pobre hombre lleva décadas sufriendo, alimentándose de su propia sangre.

languages.text: Des tubes ont été enfoncés dans la chair et remplis d'une substance infâme. L'étrange machinerie pompe les fluides à travers le corps du receveur. Le tube principal, le plus épais, a été cousu à ses lèvres. Ce pauvre homme a souffert des décennies durant, se nourrissant de son propre sang.
languages.original_text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

traits.locale_text: Des tubes ont été enfoncés dans la chair et remplis d'une substance infâme. L'étrange machinerie pompe les fluides à travers le corps du receveur. Le tube principal, le plus épais, a été cousu à ses lèvres. Ce pauvre homme a souffert des décennies durant, se nourrissant de son propre sang.

languages.text: Tüpler etine saplanmış ve iğrenç görünümlü bir maddeyle doldurulmuş. Tuhaf makine, sıvıları alıcının vücudunda döndürüyor. En kalın ana tüp, adamın dudaklarına dikilmiş. Zavallı adam, onlarca yıldır kendi kanıyla beslenerek acı çekiyor.
languages.original_text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

traits.locale_text: Tüpler etine saplanmış ve iğrenç görünümlü bir maddeyle doldurulmuş. Tuhaf makine, sıvıları alıcının vücudunda döndürüyor. En kalın ana tüp, adamın dudaklarına dikilmiş. Zavallı adam, onlarca yıldır kendi kanıyla beslenerek acı çekiyor.

languages.text: In sein Fleisch wurden Röhren getrieben und mit einer unheilvollen Substanz gefüllt. Die seltsame Maschine pumpt die Flüssigkeiten in den Körper des Empfängers. Die Hauptröhre ist mit seinen Lippen vernäht. Der arme Mann ist seit Jahrzehnten gezwungen, sein eigenes Blut zu trinken.
languages.original_text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

traits.locale_text: In sein Fleisch wurden Röhren getrieben und mit einer unheilvollen Substanz gefüllt. Die seltsame Maschine pumpt die Flüssigkeiten in den Körper des Empfängers. Die Hauptröhre ist mit seinen Lippen vernäht. Der arme Mann ist seit Jahrzehnten gezwungen, sein eigenes Blut zu trinken.

languages.text: チューブが肉に埋め込まれ、不気味な物質が満たされている。奇妙な機械は、その液体を受容者の体内で循環させる。最も太いチューブは口に縫い付けられ、その男は数十年、自らの血を啜り続けてきた。
languages.original_text: Tubes have been plunged into flesh and filled with a foul-looking substance. The strange machine cycles the fluids through the recipient's body. The main, thickest tube has been sewn to his lips — the poor man has suffered for decades, feeding on his own blood.

traits.locale_text: チューブが肉に埋め込まれ、不気味な物質が満たされている。奇妙な機械は、その液体を受容者の体内で循環させる。最も太いチューブは口に縫い付けられ、その男は数十年、自らの血を啜り続けてきた。
